description: Protocol 2 for SimplerEnv WidowX: Protocol 1 randomized object positions plus empirical Bridge/WidowX first-frame end-effector / arm start poses converted to WidowX qpos by IK at reset time. Robot base, scene, camera, objects, horizons, and success metrics are unchanged.
name: widowx_protocol2_random_positions_robot_initial_states

robot_initial_state_source.note: First 500 candidates preserve the visually inspected 500-row prefix; candidates 500..599 are additional nonempty Bridge/WidowX episodes.
